items.name: Sovereign-Engagement
items.description: Machine-readable ethical-strategic framework from Sebast Fock's books: Dogma in constitution, pragmatism in execution. Load into LLMs/agents for principled decision-making.

items.name: autonomous-fleet
items.description: Portable multi-agent orchestration framework: tool-agnostic core, mission skills, runtime adapters

items.name: CCDEW
items.description: CCDEW — Universal AI Agent Ecosystem Framework. Integrate any application via bridges, MCP, plugins, skills, and templates. Autonomous agents with 6-level learning pyramid, self-evolution, and enneagram routing.

items.name: openakita
items.description: An open-source AI assistant framework with skills and agent architecture

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: qerberos-sra
items.description: Multi-agent AI security review system with AIVBM framework, automated remediation, and mobile-friendly dashboard

items.name: homunculus
items.description: Minimal autonomous personal AI assistant, built from scratch with no agent framework. Raw HTTP to LLM, typed markdown memory, daily logs.

items.name: colony
items.description: Polymathera's no-RAG, multi-agent framework for extremely long, dense contexts (1B+ tokens).

items.name: agentforge-py
items.description: Production-grade, contracts-first framework for AI agents in Python — vendor-neutral, audit-ready.

items.name: MCP-Universe
items.description: MCP-Universe is a comprehensive framework designed for RL training, benchmarking, and developing AI agents for general tool-use.
